programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.sub_title: Fatal Attraction - The Blade of a Broken Heart
programs.desc: A young father who was excited to watch his sons grow up is fatally stabbed on Thanksgiving weekend. When detectives uncover a love triangle, they question the motive behind his murder and find a killer determined to have their pie... and eat it too.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.sub_title: For My Man - Ciera Johnson/Krystal Riordan
programs.desc: Ciera Johnson has been living a righteous life in Cleveland. But when her boyfriend questions her loyalty, she goes to extremes to prove her love.Krystal Riordan goes from rags to riches when she is adopted by a loving family. But her fairytale becomes a nightmare when she begins dating a pimp in NYC.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.sub_title: For My Man - Leslie Gordon/Erica Sheppard
programs.desc: Leslie Gordon hopes that a vacation with her man will bring them closer together. But when he lets her in on a devilish plan, her getaway turns into a nightmare.  Later, Erica Sheppard runs away from an abusive relationship with her ex. When a friend asks for a favor, her fresh start quickly fades to black.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: Teen mom Ashley Owens struggles to make ends meet in Charlotte, North Carolina until she falls for a bad boy with a plan for some easy cash. In Illinois, Nicole Eason dreams of giving her husband a loving family. When her own babies are taken away, she�ll use deception and deceit to fill their home with kids.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.sub_title: For My Man - Baited by Love
programs.desc: In a whirlwind romance, a beautiful college student falls under the spell of a local bad boy. He enourages her to help him with his criminal activities, and out of love she agrees. But when the two find themselves in an intense moment of danger, she quickly throws her morals away to protect her man.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.sub_title: For My Man - Young and Na�ve
programs.desc: When a teenage girl meets a handsome, charming older man, she feels like everything in her life is falling into place. But soon, a gruesome discovery related to the disappearance of a local woman will reveal a darker side to this love story. Before long, police are on the trail of a teen who would go to any lengths to be with her man.
